commentary: Women in Arts Microgrant 2026: 142 applications received. Review committee convenes late November. Decisions communicated by mid-December. Thank you to every applicant.
New Storefront Activation Grant cycle opens March 1, 2027. Clarification: mixed-use ground-floor commercial in West Reading is now in-scope for this cycle. Pre-applications open January 15.
Virtual application workshop for the Aspire Grant is scheduled for November 5, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET. Registration open on the PA WBC site. Final deadline for Aspire 2027 is November 30.
New tip sheet: writing executive summaries for small-business grant applications. Free download for members and non-members.
Recap of the 2026 Women-Owned Business Grant winners. Three Pennsylvania businesses landed in the top 25 this year. Applications for 2027 open in January.
Five years of teaching, four standing classes, one stage. November 14 at Santander Performing Arts Pavilion. Doors at 6:30 PM. Tickets on sale shortly. More to come.
